explanation: This command simulates a suspicious IIS module registration. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'appcmd.exe add module'.
This command simulates the use of PowerShell to load a suspicious assembly. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'system.enterpriseservices.internal.publish' in the command line.
This command simulates the registration of an assembly using gacutil. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'gacutil' and ' /I'.
This command uses spacing insertion to simulate obfuscation while maintaining the same behavior. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'appcmd.exe add module'.

This command uses substitution of '-Command' with '-c' to simulate equivalent syntax. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'system.enterpriseservices.internal.publish' in the command line.
This command uses substitution of '/I' with '/i' to simulate equivalent syntax. It matches the Sigma rule's detection condition for 'gacutil' and ' /I'.
